description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a collared short-sleeve shirt with a chest pocket and visible insignia, paired with dark pants and boots. He has a crossbody strap running from his left shoulder to his right hip, supporting a long, sheathed object at his side. His left arm is mechanical or gloved, featuring a metallic, articulated design, while his right arm appears natural. The figure's hair is styled in a side-parted, medium-length cut that partially covers his forehead. His facial features are angular, and he stands in a neutral, upright posture. The overall appearance suggests a blend of civilian and utilitarian or possibly paramilitary style.
description: A male adult figure in a collared shirt with a crossbody strap, mechanical left arm, and sheathed object at his side, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, collared shirt with insignia, crossbody strap, mechanical left arm, and sheathed object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the crossbody strap, and the mechanical left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the full length of the crossbody strap, and the sheathed object.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the natural right arm, the side of the sheathed object, and the profile of the face.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt with insignia, straight-leg pants, crossbody strap, and utility accessories
